title: Partnerships
summary: 9706 — appropriation account, partner capital/current accounts, admission and retirement.
learningObjectives: Prepare appropriation account and partner accounts.
Apply profit-sharing ratios, salary, and interest on capital.
Account for admission and retirement of partners.

simpleExplanation.title: Sharing the profits
simpleExplanation.summary: Partnership accounts split profit via an appropriation account — salaries and interest on capital come first, then shared residual profit.
steps: Net profit from SPL → appropriation account.
Salaries and interest on capital deducted.

sections.content: **Partnerships** (1.5.3) — **appropriation account** is the key extra step vs sole trader.
